title: Roasted Jamaican Chickpeas
description: Roasted, spicy, and smoky, these Jamaican chickpeas make a delicious and healthy snack or side dish. They are perfect for a quick weeknight meal or as a flavorful addition to your favorite dishes.
instructions: Rinse the chickpeas and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, cayenne pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the chickpeas to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the spice mixture.
Add the minced garlic and honey to the bowl and stir until the chickpeas are well coated.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and spread the chickpeas out in a single layer.
Roast the chickpeas in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, stirring them every 10 minutes.
After 30 minutes, check the chickpeas for crispiness. If they are not crispy enough, continue to roast them in 10-minute increments until they are crispy and golden brown.
Once the chickpeas are crispy, remove them from the oven and let them cool completely before serving.
